knowledge_gaps: AI and data center power demand will add 150-300+ TWh by 2028-30, creating a 5-16% copper demand increment as a novel demand driver absent from prior supercycles
Commodity supercycle duration is shortening in a trend pattern (22→19→14→13 years), implying a 2030-2033 peak for a cycle starting ~2020
The protein price cascade creates 2-3 years of phantom food inflation invisible on spot commodity charts, with CPI duration exceeding commodity price duration by 12-24 months
OPEC+ strategy game theory under different demand scenarios
China holds 2-5Mt of strategic copper reserves representing a material shadow supply buffer equivalent to 2-4 months of global consumption, absent from all public supply-demand models
Commodity trading house leverage (10-30x, top 5 houses with $1-1.5T combined revenue) constitutes shadow banking systemic risk comparable to pre-GFC investment banks
Simultaneous deficit in both fossil fuels and transition minerals during 2027-2032 creates an unprecedented green transition squeeze
The real yield-commodity relationship has structurally broken since 2022, with coexistence of 2% real yields and elevated commodity prices representing a new regime rather than temporary anomaly
Copper supply deficit quantification and timeline
focus.instruction: This topic has been studied at overview level. Focus on: (1) specific subtopics listed, (2) closing identified knowledge gaps, (3) cross-topic interactions with connected topics, (4) edge cases and regime-dependent behavior.

deglobalization.display_name: Deglobalization, Supply Chain Rewiring, & Trade Fragmentation
